title: cycas micholitzii subsp. multipinnata
intro: Cycas micholitzii subsp. multipinnata, also known as the Philippine cycad or multipinnate cycas, is a species of cycad, a type of ancient, seed-producing plant that is often considered a living fossil. Cycas micholitzii subsp. multipinnata has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its saponin and flavonoid content. The plant is sometimes used in herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
